text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This power swelling from within... It must be
divine protection from the statue of the
Goddesses!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! The Three Goddesses are generous
in their blessings to me... I, the Overlord, am a
genuine legend!
